title: Looking for Teacher at NIT Trichy Global Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at NIT Trichy Global Group
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy Global Group:
NIT Trichy Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy Global Group!
